summary: New feature: Database schema & connection setup
New feature: Core authentication (registration, login, session, RBAC, rate limiting)
New feature: Email verification (OTP) for new accounts
New feature: Forgot password / reset flow (OTP)
New feature: Product CRUD (images, status, availability, featured)
New feature: Product variants (size, color) with individual pricing
New feature: Category management (hierarchical)
New feature: Brand management
New feature: Product search & filtering
New feature: Server-side shopping cart (persistence, add/remove/update, real-time totals)
New feature: Multi-step checkout flow (guest checkout, auto-registration, confirmation)
New feature: Midtrans payment integration (Snap, VA, e-wallets, QRIS, webhook, idempotency)
New feature: Order creation from cart (atomic transaction)
New feature: Admin order list & detail view
New feature: Order status updates & audit trail
New feature: Export orders to CSV/Excel
New feature: Customer account (profile, order history, saved addresses)
New feature: Admin customer list with purchase history
New feature: Admin dashboard (sales metrics, revenue chart, top-selling products)
New feature: Promotions (promo code creation, management, application)
New feature: Homepage banner CRUD & display
New feature: Transactional email notifications (Mailgun)
Decision recorded: D-001
Decision recorded: D-002
Database schema & connection setup - verified working
Core authentication (registration, login, session, RBAC, rate limiting) - implemented and tested
Brand management (CRUD) - implemented and tested
Category management (hierarchical) - implemented and tested

Email verification (OTP) for new accounts implemented: added emailVerified field to users table, created OTP utilities (generate, store, verify), created Mailgun email service, added /api/auth/send-verification and /api/auth/verify-email endpoints, updated registration to send verification email

Forgot password / reset flow (OTP) implemented: created OTP utilities in lib/auth/otp.ts, added Mailgun email template for password reset, created /api/auth/forgot-password endpoint to generate and send OTP, created /api/auth/reset-password endpoint to verify OTP and update password, both endpoints have rate limiting, updated auth page UI with forgot password and reset password forms

Product variants (size, color) with individual pricing implemented: created variant CRUD API routes (POST/GET /api/products/[id]/variants, PATCH/DELETE /api/products/[id]/variants/[variantId]), updated product queries to include variants, enhanced admin product form to create/update variants with per-variant SKUs and prices, updated storefront product page to display variant options with prices
